phase_notes.plan: Implement M4-002 only: consume BenchmarkParams-shaped job params, validate target shape/cardinality/seeds, create EvalRun rows for each non-local-large target x seed, persist Router metrics and latency, preserve CUDA/MLX fine_tuned parity target rows, and create seed=0 SKIPPED_OPTIONAL for unavailable local_large.

phase_notes.build: Implemented benchmark_store EvalRun planning/state transitions, worker eval handler target validation/evaluator loop, local_large skip/available handling, Router metrics validation, and focused eval runner tests.

phase_notes.done: Pending implementation commit, WORKING closeout, and push.
